etymology.description: Stylization of 人(人) (rén, "person") as a side radical to depict a person
etymology.interpretation: 亻(亻) is a stylized form of 人(人) (rén, "person") used to indicate human-related meanings when combined with other components in characters as a radical. It visually represents a standing person, maintaining the core meaning of 'person' while facilitating the construction of complex characters.

examples.chinese: 他是一个热心的人(他是一個熱心的人)。
examples.pinyin: Tā shì yī gè rèxīn de rén.

examples.chinese: 这座城市里住着很多优秀的人(這座城市裡住著很多優秀的人)。
examples.pinyin: Zhè zuò chéngshì lǐ zhùzhe hěn duō yōuxiù de rén.
examples.english: There are many outstanding people living in this city.

examples.chinese: 每个人都有梦想(每個人都有夢想)。
examples.pinyin: Měi gè rén dōu yǒu mèngxiǎng.
